title: holcus mollis subsp. reuteri
intro: Holcus mollis subsp. reuteri, also known as Soft Brome subsp. Reuteri, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Holcus mollis subsp. reuteri include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support digestive health. Holcus mollis subsp. reuteri is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
